rows.notes: Overrode both extractors' descriptions to 'Arrearagia continued' based on the image. Both agreed on header type and empty amounts.
Overrode both extractors' descriptions to 'Alixe & Rents, variable' based on the image. Both agreed on header type and empty amounts.
Selected 'gpt-5-mini' as it accurately identified the full description and the '11½' pence, clearly visible in the image. 'claude-haiku' missed the pence and fraction, stating 'No pence visible'.

Overrode description to 'Smith. Kewington Do' based on the image ('Smith.' not 'South.'). Adopted 'gpt-5-mini's empty string representation for blank shillings and pence fields, which accurately reflects the dashes/empty space in the ledger, rather than '0'.
Overrode description to 'Merton Do' based on the image ('Merton' not 'Shelton', and no dash). Adopted 'gpt-5-mini's empty string representation for blank shillings and pence fields.

Adopted description from 'claude-haiku' as it correctly renders 'D.' (not 'D'o'). Adopted amounts and fraction (65/19/1½) from 'gpt-5-mini' as it correctly identified the whole pence and half-penny mark, which 'claude-haiku' missed.

Overrode description to 'Chase. Hill' based on the image ('Chase.' not 'Chase' or 'Chapel'). 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the amounts (19/7/2), while 'claude-haiku' misread shillings as 5 and missed the pence.
Overrode description to 'Kiddington Mills' based on the image. 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified 10 pence, which 'claude-haiku' missed, stating 'No pence visible'.
Overrode description to 'Garsington, Sadler Three Years' based on the image. 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified '11¾' pence, including the fraction, which 'claude-haiku' missed entirely.

The amounts (14/2/5½) were consistent between extractors. Overrode description to 'Do Prickett' based on the image, combining the best parts of both descriptions (removing extra dash from 'gpt-5-mini', correcting 'So.' from 'claude-haiku').
Overrode description to 'Tintinhull, Napier, Three Years' based on the image ('Tintinhull' not 'Tintinhoe'). 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the '1' pence, which 'claude-haiku' missed.

Overrode description to 'Do Beaton Six Years' based on the image ('Beaton' not 'Boston', and consistent capitalization/spacing). 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the '1' pence, which 'claude-haiku' missed.
'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the description ('Clifton Terry') and the amounts (12/19/11½) including the half-penny. 'claude-haiku' misread 'Terry' as 'Ferry' and missed the pence/fraction.
Full consensus between both extractors on the description, amounts, and fraction (11/2/0¼). Visually confirmed from the image.

'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the description ('So. Kewington Tent') and the amounts (4/5/1¾) including the specific whole pence and fraction. 'claude-haiku' misread 'So.' as 'No.' and incorrectly identified the fraction as 0.5 with 0 whole pence.
Selected 'claude-haiku' for the correct description 'Little Few Rents', matching the image. 'gpt-5-mini' misread 'Few' as 'Two'. Both agreed on header type and empty amounts.
Overrode description to 'Taylor, two Years' based on image (removing extra dash). 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified '2½' pence, while 'claude-haiku' misread it as '0.5' fraction with 0 whole pence.
Overrode description to 'Judge do' based on image (removing extra dash). 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified '9½' pence, while 'claude-haiku' misread the fraction as '0.75' and missed the whole pence.

Overrode description to 'Hirons do' based on image (correcting name and removing dash). 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified '11½' pence, while 'claude-haiku' misread the name and missed the whole pence.

Overrode description to 'Gardiner, Burdon's Do' based on image. Adopted 'gpt-5-mini's empty string representation for the blank pence field (due to a dash in the image), rather than '0' as in 'claude-haiku'.

Both extractors correctly identified the description. Adopted 'gpt-5-mini's values (2/18/6¼) as they precisely match the image, including the '6' whole pence and '0.25' fraction. 'claude-haiku' incorrectly identified the fraction as '0.75' and missed the whole pence.
